title: File upload exceeds server limit in HTTP Webhook
symptom: When attempting to upload a PDF file via the HTTP Webhook node, n8n returns a '413 Request Entity Too Large' error.
applies_when: Uploading files larger than server limit
not_this_if: File size is below server limits
No reverse proxy like nginx is used
root_cause: The error occurs because the server (nginx in this case) has a limit on the size of the request body it can accept. By default, this limit is often set to a lower value, which can prevent larger files from being uploaded.
fix_steps: Restart nginx to apply the changes
agent_instruction: Increase the client body size limit in your nginx configuration to allow larger file uploads.
